title: Reviewer Handoff Review Result Validation Report
description: Machine-readable report contract emitted by veritas-evidence-bundle validate-review-result --json. This schema validates only the shape of the validation report for a saved reviewer-handoff-review-result.json artifact. It does not create trust, does not replace out-of-band public key trust, does not prove regulatory certification, and is not completed third-party audit approval. The report records validation status, not cryptographic truth by itself. The report intentionally exposes booleans, fixed schema identifiers, and fixed diagnostics only; it does not expose raw file paths, raw JSON values, raw fingerprints, exception text, raw schema validator messages, secrets, or customer data.

ok.description: Overall validate-review-result status. True means the saved review result conformed to schema and review-boundary checks.

result_schema_valid.description: True when the saved reviewer handoff review result conforms to its JSON Schema.

decision_valid.description: True when the saved review result decision is one of the fixed supported decision values.

limitations_acknowledged.description: True when required limitation acknowledgements are present and boolean true.

artifacts_checked_shape_valid.description: True when required artifact references are present with fixed schema identifiers and checked status.

forbidden_patterns_absent.description: True when the saved review result does not contain forbidden sensitive or raw diagnostic patterns.

validated_schema_id.description: Identifies the reviewer handoff review result schema checked by validate-review-result.

report_schema_id.description: Identifies this validator result schema. This metadata validates report shape only; it does not create trust or establish cryptographic truth.

validator.description: Identifies the validator command that emitted this report.

errors.description: Fixed public diagnostics for failed review-result validation checks. Empty when ok is true.

check.description: Fixed review-result validation check that failed.

path.description: Fixed public JSONPath-like location for the failed check.

enum: result file is not valid JSON or could not be read
review result does not satisfy schema
decision must be ACCEPT, REJECT, or NEEDS_FOLLOW_UP
required limitation acknowledgements must be boolean true
required artifact references must be present and checked
review result contains forbidden sensitive or raw diagnostic text
message.description: Fixed public diagnostic. Raw external values, raw file paths, raw fingerprints, exception text, raw schema validator messages, and raw JSON values are not permitted.
